comment: Golden corpus reference metadata. See docs/corpus-guide.md for documentation.

_template.comment: This is a template showing the structure of a corpus case.
_template.source: Tool name and version (e.g., EZNEC v7.0 (NEC-2))
_template.source_url: URL to reference tool or dataset repository (optional)
_template.notes: Free-form notes on the case (reference locally in <case-name>.notes)
